params.name: Faust
params.source: Grandmaster Scrolls (0.81%), Lottery Machine (0.09%), Relic Forge (120 Relic RF), Wish Box, Wishing (0.08%),
params.description:
On Sep 28, 1832 AD, Goethe completed this very long poem.

Goethe used 60 years to complete this epic poem. It is a magnificent piece that reflects the rising era of the bourgeoisie. Belinsky believed it is on par with other famous works such as the "Iliad" and "Divine Comedy" and regarded it as a mirror of contemporary German society. As it is an extremely long piece, Belinksy admitted that he had never finished reading it.

[Classic Quotes]

In your Nothingness, I hope, the All I will recover. …
